response.justification: While Bogdan has over 15 years of solid software engineering experience and an entrepreneurial background that meets the minimum qualifications, he lacks the deep, demonstrated expertise in AI strategy expected of a Director-level Principal Engineer. His AI experience appears very recent and highly implementation-focused, which does not align with the strategic, advisory, and product-shaping requirements of this senior role.
strengths: Over 15 years of comprehensive software and infrastructure engineering experience across diverse tech stacks.
Strong entrepreneurial background as the founder of GISCollective, fulfilling a preferred qualification.
Demonstrated technical community leadership through organizing workshops, mentoring, and speaking at conferences.
concerns: Lacks the required Director-level strategic experience, currently operating mostly at a hands-on Staff/Senior level.
AI expertise is very recent (starting in 2025) and lacks the depth required to advise enterprise customers on AI strategy.
Does not possess the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
